name: The Silent Valley
description: Address 04. Recon One's last known position, nine days silent. Cross, find the trail, bring back anything that says where they went.

name: The Ledger of the Taken
description: Return to the valley. Its people know where the taken are brought — and whether four offworlders are still alive to follow.

name: The Tribute Call
description: Signal spires on the pass road call each tribute train through to the temple. Take the spires in sequence and put Command's hand on the call the Penitence is listening for.

victoryEffects.text: The tribute call is ours — the temple hears what we send. In the spire traffic, Okafor found a rival-bloc distress marker: Address 11.

name: Secure the Relay
description: Raiders hold a working relay station at a dead address. Take the consoles intact and Command owns a listening post on the network.

name: Distress: Address 11
description: A rival-bloc marker pulled from the spire traffic: their survey team is stranded at a dead site, return address burned out. Nobody's program wants to be the first to ask for help.

name: Pilgrim Roads
description: The holy city crowns the mountain above Karsu's valley. Find a way into the Penitence before Recon One's trail goes cold.

name: The Penitence
description: The plan is set. Get inside the basilica-prison and find Recon One.

name: The First Blade
description: Seryn Vael, the Luminous One's champion, stands between you and the way out.

name: Relic Vault
description: Seize the precursor artifacts from the temple armory: arm the research, and find the god's sanctum.

name: The Luminous One
description: The vault core resonates with a sanctum in the caldera. Track it, and meet the god face to face.
